github.connectedDesc: Your GitHub account has been linked.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.dialogDescription: Are you sure? This will permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.

verifyEmail.title: Check your inbox
verifyEmail.description: We sent a 6-digit code to {{email}}. Enter it below.

forgotPasswordPage.title: Reset your password
forgotPasswordPage.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset code.
forgotPasswordPage.sentNotice: If an account exists for that email, a code has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.description: Enter the code sent to {{email}} and your new password.
resetPassword.successDesc: You can now sign in with your new password.
